completedWork: Motor HP & Torque Calculator - NEW: Interactive calculator for motor horsepower, torque, RPM, efficiency, and current calculations. Features motor visualization with rotating rotor animation, real-time torque-speed curve, single-phase and three-phase current calculations, efficiency analysis, and comprehensive formulas. HP = (Torque × RPM) ÷ 5252.

Battery Charging Simulation - NEW: Interactive simulation of battery charging and discharging behavior using RC circuit model. Features battery SOC visualization with animated charging/discharging states, voltage vs time curves, real-time parameter adjustments (capacity, voltage, internal resistance, current), time constant calculations, and educational content on charging principles.
